UsedTemplates.Name: Button
UsedTemplates.Template: <widget xmlns="http://openajax.org/metadata" xmlns:appMagic="http://schemas.microsoft.com/appMagic" id="http://microsoft.com/appmagic/button" name="button" version="2.2.0">  <properties>    <property name="Text" datatype="String" defaultValue=""Button"" isExpr="true">      <appMagic:category>data</appMagic:category>    </property>    <property name="OnSelect" datatype="Behavior" defaultValue="" isExpr="true">      <appMagic:category>behavior</appMagic:category>    </property>  </properties>  <appMagic:includeProperties>    <appMagic:includeProperty name="X" defaultValue="0" />    <appMagic:includeProperty name="Y" defaultValue="0" />    <appMagic:includeProperty name="Width" defaultValue="120" />    <appMagic:includeProperty name="Height" defaultValue="40" />  </appMagic:includeProperties></widget>
